cash.note: the do-nothing benchmark: carry must beat cash after costs to matter

design.construction: single-venue Hyperliquid delta-neutral: SHORT perp + LONG spot equal notional per asset (collect side); flip_sides variant mirrors the book when trailing funding is negative (spot borrow ASSUMED, cost NOT modeled — upper bound)
design.costs: EXEC-EV1 depth-aware friction on EVERY fill of BOTH legs (perp at its tier; spot always at the widest mid-alt tier), scenario fee_bps on both legs, rebalance band, forced final close
design.funding_accrual: daily slot sum of hourly public funding rates, accrued on the perp leg at the daily close mark (documented approximation); positive funding pays the short perp
design.selection_tilt: trailing 7d mean funding (causal), rank by |funding|, hold up to top_k names on the collectable side
design.sizing: leg notional = 0.5 * equity / top_k per selected asset; perp margin basis ~1x effective leverage

regimes.classification: BTC perp trailing 90d return, point-in-time; bear < -0.10, bull > +0.10

funding_inversion.note: collect_only goes flat after the trailing signal turns; the bleed above is the funding paid during signal lag while still positioned

leg_lag_only_run.note: the positive net delta is fill-price PATH LUCK in this window, not an edge: a one-day-legged book held up to the residual fraction above UNHEDGED for a day — against the worst candle in this window that is the modeled gap loss, the real steamroller

tail_stress.liquidation_note: perp margin basis ~1x effective leverage (leg notional = half equity, unencumbered other half); liquidation mechanics not modeled — at 1x a short perp liquidates only near +100% adverse move, far outside the observed worst candle above

train_only_choice.criterion: best train-window Sharpe under conservative friction

universe.rationale: BTC/ETH/SOL via Unit spot + HYPE native spot — the liquid HL-spot-supported names; aligned window limited by the youngest spot listing (USOL 2025-05-10); UFART/UPUMP-tier listings excluded as thin
